blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses named-author AI regulation analysis from Linklaters Tech Insights.

hiring.note: Official Linklaters careers page; no ATS endpoint found.

publications.title: Tech Legal Outlook 2025 – Mid-Year Update: Round-up of developments in AI regulations in key regions
publications.byline: Ieuan Jolly, Joshua Ashley Klayman, Caitlin Potratz Metcalf, Alex Roberts, Sonia Cissé, Julian Cunningham-Day, Jennifer Calver, Elton Qemali
publications.summary: Linklaters tracks AI regulatory developments across key jurisdictions in a bylined mid-year update, useful evidence of the firm’s AI-regulatory coverage and team style.

publications.title: Omnibus Agreement: How the EU AI Act changes
publications.summary: Linklaters explains how the 7 May 2026 Omnibus agreement amends and simplifies the EU AI Act.

publications.title: Spain approves draft AI governance law: what you need to know
publications.summary: Linklaters analyses Spain’s draft AI governance law and its interaction with EU AI Act compliance and sandboxing.
